ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "air_pressure_mmHg" REAL /* Air pressure in millimeters of mercury (mmHg) */,
  "air_temperature_celsius" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity_percent" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed_m_s" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second (m/s) */,
  "solar_irradiation_w_m2" REAL /* Solar irradiation in watts per square meter (W/m²) */,
  "total_cloud_cover" TEXT /* Total cloud cover, described in tenths (e.g., 2/10–3/10) */,
  "electricity_demand_kw" REAL /* Electricity demand in kilowatts (kW) */,
  "heat_demand_kw" REAL /* Heat demand in kilowatts (kW) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data entry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the data (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "data_remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the data entry */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp when the data was recorded by the sensor */,
  "data_upload_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was uploaded to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_total_cloud_cover FOREIGN KEY ("total_cloud_cover") REFERENCES cloud_cover ("cover_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the station is situated */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the station's location */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* List of sensor types installed at the station */,
  "station_remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the location (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., environmental, energy) */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of source for the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality_levels" TEXT /* Possible quality levels for the data type (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_cover" (
  "cover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud cover description */,
  "cover_description" TEXT /* Description of the cloud cover */,
  "cover_code" TEXT /* Code representing the cloud cover (e.g., 2/10–3/10) */,
  "cloud_height" REAL /* Average height of the cloud cover */,
  "cloud_density" REAL /* Density of the cloud cover */,
  "cloud_type" TEXT /* Type of cloud (e.g., cumulus, stratus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cover_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "data_size_accessed" REAL /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  "file_encoding" TEXT /* Encoding of the file (e.g., UTF-8) */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  "file_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the file (e.g., creation date, modification date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  "file_encoding" TEXT /* Encoding of the file (e.g., UTF-8) */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  "file_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the file (e.g., creation date, modification date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Actual value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration the alert was active in seconds */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the alert (e.g., action taken, notes) */,
  "alert_assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person assigned to resolve the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("alert_assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
